name: Mobility Transportation
carrier_operation: Non-emergency wheelchair / PACE transportation (Ford Transit wheelchair vans, PACE buses)
fmcsa_address: 1200 State Cir, Ann Arbor, MI 48108 (operating address)
fmcsa_status: No SAFER record under name MOBILITY TRANSPORTATION at this address; operates as a service line of Emergent Health Partners / Huron Valley Ambulance
officers: Parent: Emergent Health Partners (EIN 45-2579119); HVA founded 1981 by five Washtenaw County hospitals
registry_source: Michigan LARA (Emergent Health Partners); IRS Form 990 / CauseIQ
notes: 'Mobility Transportation' at 1200 State Cir Ann Arbor is the Mobility Transportation Services (MTS) division of Huron Valley Ambulance / Emergent Health Partners -- not a standalone USDOT carrier. MTS provides PACE program transport with PACE buses and wheelchair-equipped Ford Transit vans. No separate FMCSA filing identified under MOBILITY TRANSPORTATION, HURON VALLEY, or EMERGENT HEALTH (all returned 'no records' in SAFER). Tuck-in viability low: this is a nonprofit hospital-system division, not a private operator.
